title: hieracium amplexicaule subsp. amplexicaule
intro: Hieracium amplexicaule subsp. amplexicaule is a subspecies of the Hawkweed plant, belonging to the dandelion family and characterized by its hairy, leafy stems and yellow flowers. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium amplexicaule subsp. amplexicaule include treating wounds, reducing fever, and soothing digestive issues, as well as its potential to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
